speaker: Solen
text: Don't be afraid. You were brought here because you are needed. Both of you.

speaker: Mira
text: Both? Where's Ren? What did you do to him?!

speaker: Solen
text: He lives — but not here. Not in this time. You stand in the past, Mira. A world still breathing, still fighting... but not for long.

speaker: Mira
text: The past? That's impossible. Who are you?

speaker: Solen
text: I am Solen. Once a keeper of the timelines, now merely a guide in their ruins.

speaker: Solen
text: This world was whole once — until the Demon King shattered it. He tore time itself in two, splitting past from future so that no one could stand against him.

speaker: Mira
text: A Demon King... you can't be serious.

speaker: Solen
text: I wish I weren't. His throne lies beyond these lands, in a place where both timelines collapse into one. That is where you must go.

speaker: Solen
text: Ren walks the future — a world already scarred by the Demon King's reign. If you wish to see him again, you must push forward. Cross the bridge ahead, and you will be one step closer.

speaker: Mira
text: ...Then I'll tear through whatever stands in my way.
